parameters.content:
## 📝 Meeting Summary Email

**What it does:** gives you a private form URL. Paste any meeting transcript into it (from Zoom, Meet, Otter, Fireflies — anything) and within seconds a clean summary email lands in your inbox: key decisions, action items with owners, and open questions.

### Setup (≈5 minutes)
1. Open **Summarize (AI)** → add your OpenAI API key.
2. Open **Email the summary** → connect your Gmail account.
3. Click **Execute workflow** once, then open the **Paste your transcript** node and copy its **Form URL** — bookmark it.
4. After any meeting: open the URL, paste the transcript, enter your email, submit. Done.

💡 Activate the workflow (toggle top-right) to make the form URL permanent.
💡 Not on Gmail? Swap the Gmail node for the Outlook or SMTP node — the rest stays the same.

— Free template from workflowstacks.com

parameters.formDescription: Paste a transcript, get a clean summary email with decisions and action items.

values.content:
=You turn raw meeting transcripts into summaries an executive actually reads.

Meeting: {{ $json['Meeting title'] }}

Transcript:
{{ $json.Transcript }}

Produce EXACTLY this structure in plain text:

TL;DR
One or two sentences - the single most important outcome of this meeting.

KEY DECISIONS
- Each decision on its own line. If none were made, write "No decisions made."

ACTION ITEMS
- [Owner] Task - deadline if mentioned. Infer the owner from the transcript; if unclear, write [Unassigned].

OPEN QUESTIONS
- Unresolved points that need follow-up. If none, omit this section.

Rules: be specific, use names from the transcript, never invent anything not said, keep the whole summary under 250 words.
